articles.title: Bottas aims for turnaround amid long pre-season odds
articles.summary: Bottas aims for turnaround amid long pre-season odds. After a tough start to his Cadillac career, things should start getting better for Bottas.

articles.summary: F1 ACADEMY Champion Pin completes maiden F1 test with Mercedes. F1 ACADEMY Champion Doriane Pin has become the first woman to drive a Mercedes F1 car.

articles.summary: WATCH: F1 drivers play the Generation Game. Ever wondered which drivers know what a VHS is? Or how to talk in text speak? Well, now is the time to find out as the current crop of F1 drivers get grilled in the Generation Game.

articles.title: Which current F1 drivers have tried other races?
articles.summary: Which current F1 drivers have tried other races?. Lots of drivers in F1’s history have raced in other categories, but we decided to take a look at what other motorsport activities the current crop have tried their hand at.

articles.summary: Win tickets to Ask DC: An evening with David Coulthard. F1 Unlocked is giving fans the chance to attend Ask DC: An Evening with David Coulthard at F1® Arcade, a must-see night celebrating all things Formula 1®.

articles.summary: Herta to take part in four FP1 sessions with Cadillac in 2026. Cadillac have announced that Colton Herta will make his practice debut with the team at the upcoming Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix.

articles.summary: TREMAYNE: How good was Ralf Schumacher?. Twenty five years ago Ralf Schumacher scored his first F1 victory, in San Marino, making a little bit of history for himself and BMW Williams, but just how good a driver was Michael's younger brother?

articles.title: The iconic World Champion whose style was as daring as his driving
articles.summary: The iconic World Champion whose style was as daring as his driving. 1976 F1 World Champion James Hunt was never one to play by the rules, as his fashion pushed back against the expectations placed on F1 drivers at the time.

articles.title: Herta’s FP1 debut for Cadillac confirmed in Barcelona
articles.summary: Herta’s FP1 debut for Cadillac confirmed in Barcelona. Colton Herta will make his FP1 debut for Cadillac at the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix in June, the team has announced.

articles.title: ‘Expectations are automatically a bit different now,’ Antonelli admits
articles.summary: ‘Expectations are automatically a bit different now,’ Antonelli admits. Kimi Antonelli admits the start of the Formula 1 season has gone better than he predicted and has automatically increased expectations as the championship leader.

articles.title: Russell reckons both career achievements and current plight play into Verstappen quit threat
articles.summary: Russell reckons both career achievements and current plight play into Verstappen quit threat. George Russell says he can understand if Max Verstappen takes a break from Formula 1 while he’s not enjoying it, but believes competitive position is playing a significant role in his complaints.

articles.summary: Verstappen says he told Lambiase he’d be ‘stupid’ not to take McLaren offer. Max Verstappen told his race engineer Gianpiero Lambiase he would be stupid not to take the offer he received from McLaren, after asking the Dutchman for his thoughts on the move.

articles.title: Norris believes F1 is not too far from ‘a really exciting era’
articles.summary: Norris believes F1 is not too far from ‘a really exciting era’. Lando Norris believes Formula 1 is close to “having a really exciting era of racing” if the sport can put more control in the driver’s hands with tweaks to the 2026 regulations.

articles.title: McLaren drivers still sure their MCL40 is a winner
articles.summary: McLaren drivers still sure their MCL40 is a winner. Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris both believe McLaren has the potential to be a consistent race-winning team this season, despite Mercedes’ early dominance.

articles.summary: Herta drawing strength from paddock welcome as he grapples with a new racing paradigm in F2. While acknowledging the high level of challenge having made the switch from IndyCar to Formula 2,  Colton Herta says that he feels welcomed into the Formula 1 ladder.

articles.summary: The RACER Mailbag, April 15. The case for buying PREMA, Dale Jr. as NASCAR czar and more racing Mount Rushmore nominations among takes in this week's Mailbag.

articles.summary: F1 regulation tweaks 'not easy', and changes are expected in stages - Permane. Talks are ongoing about how best to remedy F1's regulations, but Racing Bulls team principal Alan Permane says any changes will be gradual.

articles.summary: Miettinen dies in seven-car crash during Nurburgring race. Racing driver Juha Miettinen dies following a seven-car crash during the qualifiers for a race in Germany.

articles.summary: Russell 'would understand' if Verstappen leaves F1. George Russell says Formula 1 "would not want to lose" Max Verstappen - but would "understand" if the four-time world champion decided to leave the sport.

articles.title: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson
articles.summary: Antonelli celebrations 'lovely to see' - Benson. On the latest episode of the The Chequered Flag Podcast, pundits Andrew Benson and Sam Bird say Kimi Antonelli's Chinese Grand Prix win at 19 years old "is as big as it comes" for a young driver, after the Italian was moved to tears following his win.
